prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: ending illustration. Story world: Black Chapel Ledger. Premise: A cathedral ledger records debts paid in memory instead of money.. Setting: Cliffside cathedral archive district. Threat presence: The Creditor. Recurring motifs: ink-stained fingers, funeral bells, salt wax. Ending card for "Corruption Pact" (CORRUPTION). Summary: You accept selective erasures and become keeper of the ledger.. Deliver emotional closure with sequel-hook tension.. Subgenre: gothic horror. Tone: EERIE. Immediate scene brief: Black Chapel Ledger - Corruption Pact Ending Card. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Compose a high-end key art image with a dominant focal threat, layered foreground and background storytelling, a strong silhouette, and clear thematic clues embedded in the environment. Keep it elegant, unsettling, and market-ready.
